name: GitHub pilot — LoRA multi-split confidence (issue_to_fixing_pr)
hypothesis: Is the LoRA-fine-tune win over the frozen embedder robust across cross-repo splits, not a single-split artifact?
leakage_checks: 5 held-out-repo partitions (seeds 100-104); LoRA trains on each partition's train repos only; eval on its held-out test repos.
known_limitations: Metrics are the mean of the LoRA system over 5 cross-repo splits. The win is the DELTA over frozen: R@1 +0.061 +/- 0.021, MRR +0.052 +/- 0.010, positive on all 5 splits. Frozen mean R@1 0.494. Pilot scale; general-text base; one seed per partition. Exploratory.
